mapper.select: SELECT cost_type as costType, SUM(amount) as totalAmount, CASE cost_type WHEN 1 THEN '场地成本' WHEN 2 THEN '人工成本' WHEN 3 THEN '操作成本' WHEN 4 THEN '运能成本' WHEN 5 THEN '折旧成本' WHEN 6 THEN '其他' ELSE '未知' END as costTypeName FROM t_cost_management GROUP BY cost_type ORDER BY cost_type

SELECT cost_type as costType, SUM(amount) as totalAmount, CASE cost_type WHEN 1 THEN '场地成本' WHEN 2 THEN '人工成本' WHEN 3 THEN '操作成本' WHEN 4 THEN '运能成本' WHEN 5 THEN '折旧成本' WHEN 6 THEN '其他' ELSE '未知' END as costTypeName FROM t_cost_management WHERE month = #{month} GROUP BY cost_type ORDER BY cost_type
